[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01111000 4
1 11100000 3
2 01101010 4
3 00000100 1
4 01111000 4
5 11100000 3
6 01101010 4
7 00000100 1

01 10 01000000 1
12 21 01010000 2
23 32 01101000 3
34 43 01101010 4 match 2 6
45 54 00000010 1
56 65 10000110 3
67 76 11100100 4
70 07 11100001 4

02 20 01101000 3
13 31 01000000 1
24 42 01101000 3
35 53 10000010 2
46 64 01101010 4 match 2 6
57 75 10000100 2
60 06 11101010 5
71 17 01000100 2

03 30 11101010 5
14 41 01000000 1
25 52 00000000 a
36 63 11101010 5
47 74 01100000 2
50 05 10000010 2
61 16 01010100 3
72 27 01100000 2

04 40 01101010 4 match 2 6
15 51 00000100 1 match 3 7
26 62 01111000 4 match 0 4
37 73 11100000 3 match 1 5
[completion]

1 37 73
